name: bnb-zkid-sdk
description: Design-stage TypeScript SDK skeleton for BNB ZKID.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp -R fixtures dist/fixtures && mkdir -p dist/examples/browser && cp -R examples/browser/* dist/examples/browser/
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/tests/config/load-config.test.js dist/tests/harness/minimal-sdk.test.js dist/tests/primus/adapter.test.js dist/tests/primus/request-resolver.test.js dist/tests/workflow/collect-primus-attestation.test.js dist/tests/workflow/collect-primus-attestation-from-registry.test.js dist/tests/client/configured-client.test.js dist/tests/client/public-client.test.js
